title: Step 1: Create a New Frame Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New Frame Object

Step 1: Create a New Frame Object

	Click the [All Tools]  [Frame]
	 button  on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	Move the mouse over the Image Display area. You will
	 see the mouse pointer change to the Frame object icon.
	Continue moving the mouse until the icon is at the
	 desired position in the Image Display area, then click the left mouse
	 button to create the object.
	Notice that a name for the
	 object is automatically created. In the example, it is called "Frame01"
	 because this is the first Frame object created for this sequence.
	  (We will explain how to change the name later.)
